title: A Rainy Monday
content: It rained all morning on Monday. Olivia looked outside and felt tired already. She did not want to leave her warm bed. The gray sky and cold wind made the day feel slow and heavy. She put on her yellow raincoat and walked carefully to the train station. Many people carried umbrellas and drank hot coffee. At work, everyone talked about the weather. During lunch, Olivia sat near the window and listened to the sound of rain. She hoped the sun would return soon.
